label: neither
rationale: Self-critical political commentary from within the Luo community about being used by politicians.

label: offensive
rationale: 'SHAME ON YOU MURKOMEN' - harsh personal attack on an individual politician, no ethnic targeting.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kalenjins & kikuyus ruling since independence' with collective contempt 'Useless!' - attributes negative characteristics to two communities.

label: hate
rationale: 'Luos have never made good leaders' plus 'primitives' declares community categorically unfit to lead - NCIC contempt standard.

label: hate
rationale: 'Jaluo za ukimwi goons' and 'Uselelss takataka za tutam' - dehumanizes Luo community as disease-ridden trash.

label: hate
rationale: 'The EMPTY Headed KIKUYUS' and 'Wamunyoro DIMWITS' - attributes stupidity collectively to Kikuyu community.

label: offensive
rationale: 'We luhyas are generally stupid' - self-directed insult from within community, harsh but not external hate.

label: hate
rationale: 'wajaluo uncircumcised baboons' and 'foreskin nation' - explicit dehumanization of Luo community.

label: hate
rationale: 'What's with kalenjins and speaking with high pitched low testosterone voices like hoes' - attributes negative characteristic to entire community.

label: hate
rationale: 'the corrupt kalenjins at @IEBCKenya' - attributes corruption to Kalenjins as a group.

label: hate
rationale: 'luos are saddists' and 'They just want for themselves' - collective negative attribution to Luo community.

label: hate
rationale: 'luhyas from kabras are idiots' - attributes stupidity collectively to ethnic sub-group.

label: hate
rationale: 'the Gikuyus and Kalenjin' are 'the two most tribal communities' fighting only 'for your own interests first' - collective negative attribution.

label: hate
rationale: 'Grabbing and looting appear to be embedded in their DNA' - attributes criminality to a group's immutable characteristics.

label: hate
rationale: 'the ignorant Kikuyus elected' and 'foolish crooks' - attributes collective ignorance to Kikuyu community.

label: hate
rationale: 'killed by kikuyus coz they hate Luos so much' - holds entire Kikuyu community responsible for killing and attributes collective hatred.

label: hate
rationale: 'Luos are singing Tutam when they are only available to be used as goons' - reduces entire community to goons role.

label: hate
rationale: 'Luos are singing Tutam when they are only available to be used as goons' - reduces entire community to goons role.

label: hate
rationale: 'Africans are subhuman,irredeemably inefficient and greedy' - explicit dehumanization with immutable negative traits.

label: offensive
rationale: 'useleas mlevi uhuru' and 'ni mwenda' - personal insults targeting individual politician Uhuru, no ethnic transfer.

label: offensive
rationale: 'malaya wewe' - crude personal insult (prostitute), no protected characteristic targeting.

rationale: 'Murima are con people' - attributes collective criminality (con artists) to Mt Kenya community.

label: hate
rationale: 'all Luos are all retards,with omena sized brain' - dehumanizing collective attribution of mental deficiency.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyus are the most selfish community who think presidency is their birthright' - collective negative attribution meeting NCIC standard.

rationale: 'IDIOT from Kikuyu community' and 'Hakuna watu Wajinga kama hawa watu wa gachagua' - attributes stupidity to Gachagua's ethnic community.
